Ohlify is a marketplace for paid 1:1 audio + video consultations with verified professionals. You pay once. We hold the money. They get paid when the call is delivered — or you do, automatically, if it isn't.

How it works

Three steps,
none of them tedious.

We obsessed over the booking flow until it disappeared. What's left is a payment, a calendar, and a real human at the other end of the line.

  1. 01

    Find someone who's done it before.

    Search by category, browse curated picks, or follow a share link from a professional you know. Every listing carries real ratings + a verified credentials badge.

  2. 02

    Pay once. Money sits in escrow.

    Pick a slot, pay with card or bank transfer. Your money is held until the call is delivered — no subscriptions, no hidden fees, no recurring anything.

  3. 03

    Talk. Get paid. Or get refunded.

    Join with one tap when it's call time. The professional gets paid the moment it ends. If they don't show up, you get every naira back, automatically.

Why Ohlify

Trust isn't a feature. It's
how the whole thing is built.

Verification

3 of 4 complete

Identity documentDone
Selfie livenessDone
Bank accountDone
Credential reviewIn review

Average review time

17 hours

Verified, every one

The KYC isn't a checkbox.

Every professional clears a real-document identity check, a selfie liveness pass, and a credential review by a human admin before they can take a single naira.

We track no-shows, mid-call drops, and dispute outcomes per professional. Strikes accumulate. Bad actors fall off the platform — they don't get away with a quiet re-listing.

Wallet

All movements settle live

Available balance

₦42,500

Booking · Dr. Okonkwo−₦15,000
Refund · no-show+₦15,000
Booking · Funmi Bello−₦12,000

Escrow, not promises

Your money doesn't leave the platform until the call does.

When you book, we charge you and route the funds into a double-entry escrow ledger. The professional sees the booking confirmed — but doesn't see a single naira until the call ends.

No-show? Full refund, automatic, within seconds. Mid-call drop? We pro-rate it. You never have to email support to chase your own money back.

In call12:48

End
Video

The call itself

Crystal audio, no app dance.

Built on enterprise real-time infrastructure. Tokens renew silently mid-call. Connection drops trigger automatic reconnects. CallKit on iOS so an incoming ring looks like a phone call, not a notification.

Works on a Surulere data plan. Works in Lagos traffic. Works.

Try it

See the whole flow
without signing up.

Real components from the app, wired to a fake state machine. Tap through Browse → Schedule → Pay → Talk → Rate. No network, no money, no surprises.

For professionals

Your expertise,
on its own terms.

Bookings, payments, identity checks, even the ringing phone — all handled. You spend your hour doing what you're actually good at.

Earn on Ohlify →

  • Price your own time.

    Set rates per call type and duration. Adjust whenever you want — no approval needed.

  • Get paid when the call ends.

    Escrow releases to your wallet automatically. Withdraw to your bank in minutes, not days.

  • No-show protection.

    If a caller doesn’t show, you keep a meaningful slice of the booking. Your time matters.

  • A profile that does the marketing.

    Verified badge, real ratings, a shareable handle. Pass the link to your network and let the calls come in.

Questions

Things people ask us first.

  • 01Who can I book on Ohlify?+

    Verified professionals across healthcare, law, finance, coaching, design, engineering, and more. Every professional completes a KYC check — identity, credentials, and a video selfie — before they can take their first booking.

  • 02How much does a call cost?+

    Each professional sets their own rate per call type and duration. You see the price up-front before you confirm a booking. No surprise add-ons; no subscriptions.

  • 03What happens if my professional doesn't show up?+

    You're refunded automatically. Our system tracks join states for both parties — if the professional hasn't joined within the grace window, the booking is voided, your money returns to your wallet, and the professional receives a strike on their record.

  • 04Is my payment secure?+

    Payments are processed by Paystack and held in an escrow ledger that follows double-entry accounting. We never store your card details. Refunds happen automatically over the same channel.

  • 05Can I cancel a booking?+

    Yes. Cancel outside the cancellation window for a full refund. Inside the window, a small penalty may apply — the exact rules sit on each professional's profile.

  • 06How do professionals get paid?+

    When a call ends successfully, the professional's share lands in their in-app wallet. They withdraw to their verified bank account and we settle within minutes.

  • 07Where is Ohlify available?+

    We're starting in Nigeria with Nigerian payment rails, but the product is built for global use. New countries roll out as we onboard payment partners.

  • 08How do I become a professional on Ohlify?+

    Tap "Earn on Ohlify" anywhere on the site. You'll complete a short KYC (ID, bank account, role, rates) and our review team usually approves within 24 hours.

Ohlify

A marketplace for paid 1:1 calls with verified professionals. Built mobile-first. Made in Lagos.
